personas.name: Mindful Seeker
personas.description: A user comparing meditation apps who cares most about real free access, optional donations, and an experience without ads or paywalls.
pain_points: Frustrated with ads and subscription-based models in meditation apps
Concerned about affordability and accessibility of meditation resources
context: Currently using or interested in using meditation apps
constraints: Limited budget for meditation app subscriptions
Prefers simple and clean app interface

personas.name: Insomniac
personas.description: A user who opens Medito at bedtime and depends on sleep content, calm audio, and playback that stays out of the way.

personas.name: Anxious Individual
personas.description: A user who turns to Medito during anxiety, stress, grief, panic, or emotional overload and needs targeted support quickly.

personas.name: Mindfulness Seeker
personas.description: A new or returning meditator who relies on courses, reminders, and visible progress to build a steady meditation habit.
pain_points: Difficulty maintaining streaks due to app issues or personal inconsistency
Limited visibility into course progress across devices
Challenges in finding suitable meditation content for their needs
context: Using the app daily or nearly daily
May have tried other meditation apps or practices before
Seeking a sense of community and support through the app
constraints: May have limited time for meditation each day
Prefers a user-friendly and accessible app experience
Values free or affordable meditation resources

personas.name: Frustrated Medito User
personas.description: A frequent user who expects playback, search, login, and progress to keep working across updates, devices, and everyday interruptions.
context: Regularly uses the app for meditation
Expects updates to improve app experience
constraints: Limited by app crashes and update issues
Frustrated by lack of progress continuity
